meaning: n.书信,使徒书,书信体诗文,<圣经>使徒书
examples: "Had the Greeks held novelty in such disdain as we," asked Horace in his epistle, "what work of ancient date would now exist?"
I Tertius, who wrote this epistle, salute you in the Lord.
Ye are our epistle written in our hearts, known and read of all men.
However, if you are seeking to directly counter his point of view via your epistle, maybe include your friend in the post via tag -- in a constructive way.
